name: Competitor Analysis Framework
description: Competitor Analysis Framework - Marketing template for research professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template Step 1: Profile Your Competitors Go to the Competitor Profiles tab. Enter up to 5 competitors with their key details: company name, URL, founded year, size, funding, positioning statement, and target market. Step 2: Compare Features Use the Feature Comparison tab to map your product/service features against competitors. Score each on a 1-5 scale. The template highlights gaps and advantages. Step 3: Analyze Marketing The Marketing Analysis tab compares channels, messaging, content strategy, and brand positioning across all competitors. Step 4: Build Battlecards The Batt
